denomination_relation: Transfer-class subunit; mediates memory into exchange.
substrate: Silver-blue transmissive token, renderable as icon, card, and exchange marker.
issuance_logic: Issued when a canonical ITEM record represents circulation, mediation, or transactional passage.
anti_entropy_claim: Preserves continuity during transfer by carrying structured memory through exchange.
use_case: Transactional artifact, relay marker, sub-denominational movement unit.
visual_grammar: Luminous pathways, signal geometry, light ring structure, visible conduit logic.
color_grammar: Silver, blue-white, pale cyan, low gold accent only when bridging to Singulus.
geometric_grammar: Paths, nodes, channels, split rings, directional flow marks.
legibility_constraints: Must read as motion/relay even at small icon size; avoid dense ornamental borders.
provenance: Derived from ACCRE–ITEM Currency Handshake and VMS triad semantics.
